posts.angle: AI adoption creates more recurring subscriptions that need a reliable payment layer
posts.copy: AI tool adoption keeps growing. Specialized models like GPT-Rosalind mean more recurring subscriptions for teams to manage. RichXPay supports these workflows with virtual cards funded by USDT or USDC.
sourceTitles: Introducing GPT-Rosalind for life sciences research
posts.landingSummary: Subscription payment page focused on recurring billing stability and virtual-card management.
